response: Japan, a nation with a population of 125 million and a globally high average life expectancy of 84.6 years, maintains a $4.2 trillion gross domestic product (GDP) supported by $756 billion in annual exports. Its core economic metrics include a 1.1% annual GDP growth rate, a low 2.6% unemployment rate, a 3.2% inflation rate, and a notably high debt-to-GDP ratio of 263%.
